Event: Cornucopia Island February 2026
Event Date: 05/03/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: A310
Sacrament of the Mineral

Triggers: Once in a while

Stone of Oblivion
The unit turns 3 random enemy units into rocks for 4 sec. During that time, the targets are unable to move, and take 45% more damage. The targets also receive 375000 magic damage every second for the duration. When the effect wears off, the targets explode. The explosion deals 500000 pure damage to the targets, and their physical and magic armor are reduced by 35% for 3 sec. 2 nearest enemy units are also hit by rocks. The rocks deal 437500 physical damage on impact and stun the targets for 2 sec.

When an enemy unit is petrified or turned into a rock, the artifact's owner deals 468800 magic damage to all enemy units. The ability triggers at most once per 3 sec.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
